name: Point2d
summary: Represents the two coordinates of a point in two-dimensional space, using Double-precision floating point numbers.

constructors.name: Point2d(Point2d)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of Point2d by copying another Point2d.

params.name: point
params.doc: The point that will be copied.

constructors.name: Point2d(Point3d)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of Point3d by copying the first two coordinates of a Point3d.

params.name: point
params.doc: The point that will be used: the Z (third) coordinate is discarded.

constructors.name: Point2d(Vector2d)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of Point2d by converting a vector.

params.name: vector
params.doc: The vector that will be copied.

constructors.name: Point2d(Double, Double)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of Point2d from coordinates.

methods.name: Add(Point2d, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d Add(Point2d point1, Point2d point2)
methods.summary: Adds a point with a point. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the + operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise summed with the other point.

methods.name: Add(Point2d, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d Add(Point2d point, Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Adds a point with a vector. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the + operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise summed with the vector.

methods.name: Add(Vector2d, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d Add(Vector2d vector, Point2d point)
methods.summary: Adds a vector with a point. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the + operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise summed with the vector.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.signature: public int CompareTo(Point2d other)
methods.summary: Compares this Point2d with another Point2d. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other Point2d to use in comparison.

returns.doc: 0: if this is identical to other-1: if this.X < other.X-1: if this.X == other.X and this.Y < other.Y+1: otherwise.

methods.name: DistanceTo
methods.signature: public double DistanceTo(Point2d other)
methods.summary: Computes the distance between two points.

returns.doc: The length of the line between the two points, or 0 if either point is invalid.

methods.name: Divide
methods.signature: public static Point2d Divide(Point2d point, double t)
methods.summary: Divides a Point2d by a number. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the / operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise divided by t.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Point2d other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Point2d.EpsilonEquals(Rhino.Geometry.Point2d,System.Double)"]

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.signature: public override bool Equals(Object obj)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified System.Object is a Point2d and has the same values as the present point.

returns.doc: true if obj is a Point2d and has the same coordinates as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(Point2d)
methods.signature: public bool Equals(Point2d point)
methods.summary: Determines whether the specified Point2d has the same values as the present point.

returns.doc: true if point has the same coordinates as this; otherwise false.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.signature: public override int GetHashCode()
methods.summary: Computes a hash number that represents the current point.

returns.doc: A hash code that is not unique for each point.

methods.name: Multiply(Double, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d Multiply(double t, Point2d point)
methods.summary: Multiplies a Point2d by a number. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the * operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Multiply(Point2d, Double)
methods.signature: public static Point2d Multiply(Point2d point, double t)
methods.summary: Multiplies a Point2d by a number. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the * operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Subtract(Point2d, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Vector2d Subtract(Point2d point1, Point2d point2)
methods.summary: Subtracts the second point from the first point. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the - operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new vector that is point1 coordinate-wise subtracted by point2.

methods.name: Subtract(Point2d, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d Subtract(Point2d point, Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Subtracts a vector from a point. (Provided for languages that do not support operator overloading. You can use the - operator otherwise)

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise subtracted by vector.

methods.name: ToString()
methods.signature: public override string ToString()
methods.summary: Constructs the string representation for the current point.

returns.doc: The point representation in the form X,Y.

methods.name: ToString(String, IFormatProvider)
methods.signature: public string ToString(string format, IFormatProvider formatProvider)
methods.summary: Formats the value of the current instance using the specified format.

params.name: format
params.doc: The format to use. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to use the default format defined for the type of the IFormattable implementation.

params.name: formatProvider
params.doc: The provider to use to format the value. -or- A null reference (null in Visual Basic) to obtain the numeric format information from the current locale setting of the operating system.

returns.doc: The value of the current instance in the specified format.

methods.name: Transform
methods.signature: public void Transform(Transform xform)
methods.summary: Transforms the present point in place. The transformation matrix acts on the left of the point. i.e., result = transformation*point

methods.name: Addition(Point2d, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d operator +(Point2d point1, Point2d point2)
methods.summary: Adds a point with a point.

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise summed with the other point.

methods.name: Addition(Point2d, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d operator +(Point2d point, Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Adds a point with a vector.

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise summed with the vector.

methods.name: Addition(Vector2d, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d operator +(Vector2d vector, Point2d point)
methods.summary: Adds a vector with a point.

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise summed with the vector.

methods.name: Division
methods.signature: public static Point2d operator /(Point2d point, double t)
methods.summary: Divides a Point2d by a number.

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise divided by t.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Point2d a, Point2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two Point2d have equal values.

returns.doc: true if the coordinates of the two points are exactly equal; otherwise false.

methods.name: GreaterThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator >(Point2d a, Point2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified Point2d comes after (has superior sorting value than) the second point. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is larger than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y is larger than b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: GreaterThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator >=(Point2d a, Point2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified Point2d comes after (has superior sorting value than) the second point, or it is equal to it. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is larger than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y >= b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Point2d a, Point2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two Point2d have different values.

returns.doc: true if the two points differ in any coordinate; false otherwise.

methods.name: LessThan
methods.signature: public static bool operator <(Point2d a, Point2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified point comes before (has inferior sorting value than) the second point. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is smaller than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y is smaller than b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: LessThanOrEqual
methods.signature: public static bool operator <=(Point2d a, Point2d b)
methods.summary: Determines whether the first specified point comes before (has inferior sorting value than) the second point, or it is equal to it. Coordinates evaluation priority is first X, then Y.

returns.doc: true if a.X is smaller than b.X, or a.X == b.X and a.Y <= b.Y; otherwise, false.

methods.name: Multiply(Double, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d operator *(double t, Point2d point)
methods.summary: Multiplies a Point2d by a number.

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Multiply(Point2d, Double)
methods.signature: public static Point2d operator *(Point2d point, double t)
methods.summary: Multiplies a Point2d by a number.

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise multiplied by t.

methods.name: Subtraction(Point2d, Point2d)
methods.signature: public static Vector2d operator -(Point2d point1, Point2d point2)
methods.summary: Subtracts point2 from point1.

returns.doc: A new vector that is point1 coordinate-wise subtracted by point2.

methods.name: Subtraction(Point2d, Vector2d)
methods.signature: public static Point2d operator -(Point2d point, Vector2d vector)
methods.summary: Subtracts a vector from a point.

returns.doc: A new point that is coordinate-wise subtracted by vector.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: If any coordinate of a point is UnsetValue, then the point is not valid.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Accesses the coordinates of this point.

properties.name: MaximumCoordinate
properties.summary: Gets the largest valid coordinate, or RhinoMath.UnsetValue if no coordinate is valid.

properties.name: MinimumCoordinate
properties.summary: Gets the smallest (both positive and negative) valid coordinate, or RhinoMath.UnsetValue if no coordinate is valid.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X (first) coordinate of the point.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y (second) coordinate of the point.
